description.overview: The Bloodhound has the most powerful nose of any dog breed, able to follow trails over 300 hours old.
description.temperament: Bloodhounds are gentle, patient, and affectionate but can be stubborn when on a scent.
description.health: Prone to bloat, hip dysplasia, and ear infections. Drool significantly.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs but need secure areas - will follow scents.

verdict.summary: Gentle giants with legendary noses. Bloodhounds are patient and affectionate but stubborn when tracking. Need secure yards and patient owners.
